answers: Memory palace (method of loci): visualize a familiar place, place items to remember at specific locations. Walk through mentally.
Techniques: spaced repetition, mnemonics, chunking, visualization, and association. Combine for best results.
Tips: sleep well (memory consolidates during sleep), exercise regularly, teach others, and reduce multitasking.
Smriti barhanor upay: niyomito ghum dao, exercise koro, mnemonic use koro, ar spaced repetition practice koro.
